about.after: mp-hp-disjoint (MP added, kept disjoint from HP)
about.before: main (Babel without this PR — no MP)
about.note: Isolates the full effect of PR #886 (add MP, disjoint from HP) on Babel. Both builds share cached babel_downloads and were built the same day so UberGraph concords match; the only difference is this PR's code. Wholly new MP-only cliques appear as the positive PhenotypicFeature clique_count.diff, not as change rows.
